# AI Provider Watch

AI Provider Watch publishes a machine-readable provider-change event feed for AI
developer cost, quota, token accounting, model availability, defaults,
deprecations, incidents, API contracts, and migration risk.

Start here:

- README: /README.md
- Architecture: /docs/architecture.md
- Event schema: /docs/schema/event.md
- Agent consumption: /docs/agent-consumption.md
- Source packages: /docs/contributors/source-packages.md
- Contribution rules: /CONTRIBUTING.md
- Root agent guide: /AGENTS.md

Core commands:

```bash
uv run apw validate
uv run apw index --check
uv run apw source test
uv run apw release dry-run --output .apw/release-dry-run
uv run apw latest
uv run apw diff --since 7d
uv run apw explain <event-id>
uv run apw candidate generate --observations <observations.json> --output .apw/candidates --created-at <iso-date-time>
uv run apw candidate review-pr-body --observations <observations.json> --candidates data/candidates/review
```
